title: Germany entry job search
advice: Prioritize jobs with low hiring friction: warehouse, delivery coordination, customer support, hotel operations, retail, cleaning operations, junior sales, and logistics admin.
Search with English and German keywords because many listings are indexed differently.
Use a one-page CV with location, work authorization status, languages, availability, and measurable past work.
Apply in daily batches, then follow up by phone or short email within 48 hours.

title: Low budget action plan
advice: Prefer actions with zero cash cost and short feedback loops.
Track outreach volume, interview count, and reply rate instead of waiting for motivation.
Use free learning resources only until income stabilizes.
Avoid broad courses until a specific job target is chosen.

title: Fast digital upskill
advice: Pick one monetizable skill for 14 days and produce proof of work.
For backend-oriented profiles, build small API demos and document them with screenshots.
Package learning as visible output: GitHub repo, short case study, and outreach message.
Use AI to draft, but manually verify every technical claim.
